name: BoardBack Capture Tool
description: Transform Your Browser Into a Visual Workspace WhiteBroad is more than a bookmark tool — BoardBack’s a visual productivity system built for people who work with ideas, research, and multiple tabs every day. Designed with a local-first approach, your bookmarks and workspace stay on your device — private, fast, and fully under your control. No unnecessary cloud storage. No tracking. Just your data, your way. Capture pages as visual cards, organize them into smart groups, and manage everything from a clean, powerful workspace.
